title: The Straw Hats Turn the Raid Around
description: On pages 4–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Sanji, Queen as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Let's just quietly take our leave.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter what happens from here on, our left arms will bear...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...a journey of hope across a sea of despair...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the darkness of the storm, I encoun-tered a little ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: it gave me a push and said...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm going to become a pirate Queen!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
